Name: ConAgra Foods Inc
Description: Conagra Brands, Inc. (formerly ConAgra Foods) is an American consumer packaged goods holding company headquartered in Chicago, Illinois. Conagra makes and sells products under various brand names that are available in supermarkets, restaurants, and food service establishments.
Address: 222 WEST MERCHANDISE MART PLAZA, CHICAGO, IL, UNITED STATES, 60654
